text: Turn the compost pile every two weeks so it gets enough air to break down properly.
Balance green nitrogen scraps with brown carbon material like dry leaves in the compost bin.
Finished compost smells earthy and the original food scraps are no longer recognizable.
Use the rear derailleur barrel adjuster to fix a bicycle chain that hesitates when shifting gears.
Keep the bicycle chain lightly lubricated and wipe away the excess oil afterward.
Check the tire pressure before every long bicycle ride to avoid pinch flats.
Feed a sourdough starter with equal weights of flour and water once a day to keep it active.
A long cold proof in the refrigerator develops a deeper, more sour flavor in the bread loaf.
Score the top of the sourdough dough before baking so it can expand without tearing.
Retrieval fuses its ranking signals by reciprocal rank rather than raw score, because lexical and vector magnitudes are not directly comparable.
An absolute dense-relevance floor at the selection step drops off-topic hits without changing the rank fusion itself.
The query router sorts each query into a class and picks per-signal weights, suppressing associative graph expansion for simple factual lookups.
Bumping the embedded graph database to a new minor version breaks the on-disk format, so before version one the store is recreated fresh rather than migrated in place.
The store keeps raw conversation episodes alongside the durable facts derived from them, fused together into one ranked recall result.
The embedder is an OpenAI-compatible client that L2-normalizes every vector so cosine similarity is the default distance.
A background consolidation pass distills durable facts out of raw episodes, using a deterministic rule extractor by default.
Forgetting gradually decays the importance of unpinned memories, while pinned essentials are exempt from the decay sweep.
Every captured memory records its writer, model family, and the trust assigned at write time as provenance.
A newer memory can mark an older one as superseded, and recall surfaces the replacement link so stale facts stay visible.
Work items track tasks and their status separately from decaying memory episodes, so a plan persists even as raw notes fade.
The operator surface is a single-page web console rather than a terminal interface, and read access is scoped to the viewer's own namespace.
